title: KV namespaces
excerpt: description: A KV namespace is a key-value database replicated across Cloudflare's global network. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/kv/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. A KV namespace is a key-value database replicated to Cloudflare’s global network. Bind your KV namespaces through Wrangler or via the Cloudflare dashboard.
